texto: Most of us haven't begun to tap our own potential
autor: we're operating way below capacity. And we'll continue as long as we are looking for someone to give us the key to the kingdom. We must realize that the kingdom is in us
explicacao: Citação de we're operating way below capacity. And we'll continue as long as we are looking for someone to give us the key to the kingdom. We must realize that the kingdom is in us sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Most of us haven't begun to tap our own potential” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
